title: stelis umbonis
intro: Stelis umbonis, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Stelis umbonis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis umbonis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Stelis umbonis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
